title: MOS Resource Pack
description: Resource pack created by TheM_O_S_234. Uses elements from Vanilla Tweaks with GUI customisations by TheM_O_S_234
body:
![MOS Resource Pack Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7bc1168d5ea12d5b7fa80f5cd010ab24999b54de.png)
# MOS Resource Pack

**MOS Resource Pack** is a comprehensive visual enhancement pack for Minecraft, created by **[TheM_O_S_234](https://www.themos234.com/)**. Built using **[Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/)** as a base, it features over 70 carefully curated tweaks that refine Minecraft’s visuals while staying true to the vanilla aesthetic. It also includes **custom-designed UI elements** with a sleek dark mode and a **distinct blue accent colour** for a cleaner, more immersive interface.

The pack combines a wide range of subtle improvements, consistency fixes, model upgrades, and aesthetic enhancements in a single cohesive package.

Whether you're after visual polish, quality-of-life features, or immersive touches, **MOS Resource Pack** enhances the game without compromising performance or familiarity.

## Key Features:

- **Visual Fixes & Consistency Enhancements**
  - Corrects visual bugs and texture mismatches (e.g. *ItemStitchingFix, CactusBottomFix, BlazeFix, SlimeParticleFix*)  
  - Ensures consistent visual design across items and blocks (*ConsistentBucketFix, StickyPistonSides, TadpoleBucketFix*)


- **3D Model Improvements**
  - Adds depth and realism to ladders, vines, sugar cane, stonecutters, rails, and more (*3DLadders, 3DVines, 3DStonecutters, etc.*)


- **Custom UI Overhaul**
  - **Dark Mode UI** for better contrast and comfort  
  - **Blue accent colours** for menus and buttons  
  - **Smoother fonts** and **literal gamerule names** for improved clarity


- **Audio Tweaks**
  - Subtly reduces noise from common mobs and ambient effects (*QuieterRain, QuieterVillagers, QuieterPhantoms, etc.*)


- **Immersive Visual Effects**
  - Lowered shield and fire placement, unobtrusive rain, rainbow XP bar, directional dispensers, and more


- **Natural Texture Variants**
  - Adds subtle randomness to terrain and blocks (*VariatedDirt, ConnectedBookshelves, RandomMossRotation, etc.*)


- **Utility Features & Overlays**
  - Brewing stand guide, proper break particles, red golem flowers, directional hoppers, and other useful tweaks


- **Optimised for Compatibility**
  - Fully compatible with **Optifine**, **Sodium**, and most modern rendering mods


- **Actively Maintained**
  - Regularly updated to support **major Minecraft versions**, ensuring continued compatibility and improvements

---

Whether you're exploring, building, or surviving, the **MOS Resource Pack** offers a polished, performance-friendly upgrade to the vanilla Minecraft experience. It blends handcrafted design with close attention to visual detail.
